contradictions_detected.issue: V3 define S25 como 'Endpoints de IA, Hugging Face y prompting evaluado'. Plataforma id 'streamlit-dashboards' es 'Dashboards Interactivos y Streamlit' (src/lib/course/sections/s25-streamlit-dashboards.ts).
contradictions_detected.resolution: KEEP platform id 'streamlit-dashboards' (learning_roadmap.md authority). TARGET production content = V3 4×2. Legacy inventariado, no borrado.
contradictions_detected.authority: learning_roadmap.md = id/title platform; V3 = counting + outcomes target
contradictions_detected.impact: No claim de section passed. PHASE 4+ retheme.

contradictions_detected.issue: You Do / project de plataforma no coincide con gate V3: clasificador/extractor especializado y generador de narrativa con JSON validado; no se acepta una salida sin evidencia n...
contradictions_detected.resolution: Mapear You Do legacy; TARGET project_increment en phase3.
contradictions_detected.impact: You Do reescritura en PHASE 4; no borrar hasta reemplazo verificado

contradictions_detected.issue: Exam bank 4×3 legacy vs 8×3 V3 subtopics
contradictions_detected.resolution: PHASE 5 introduce 8 familias A/B/C V3; legacy se reasigna o retira en seed coordinado
